fieldValues.value: **35.** Every `DocumentSection.renderViewId` in any `DocumentView` within `Package.documentViews[]` must reference a `View.id` that appears in `Package.views[]` or `Package.dependencyRefs`. If `mode === "bundled"`, that `View` must be present in `Package.views[]`.

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 08-16 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
